title: [CI:DOCS] Tutorials:mac-win-client - Fix command ensuring sshd is enabled
body: `-s, --signal` requires a value and is probably not intended to be here since it would send a signal to the `sshd` process.

comments.body:
/approve
@lucendio Can you add a signoff to your commit - `git commit --amend -s` and re-pushing should do the trick.
